function_reachability: Is it impossible for function 'printf' to reach function 'main'?

Is the loop with condition 'i<4' always executed?

Is the loop with condition 'j<5' always executed?
dominators: Is it guaranteed that whenever line 4:  <statement> for(i=0;i<4;i++){ </statement> is reached, the statement line 5:  <statement> for(j=0;j<5;j++){ </statement> has already been reached?
Is it guaranteed that whenever line 10:  <statement> break; </statement> is reached, the statement line 6:  <statement> if(i==0||i==3) </statement> has already been reached?
data_dependency: Does the value of variable j at line 5: <statement> for(j=0;j<5;j++){ </statement> depend on the value of variable i at line 4: <statement> for(i=0;i<4;i++){ </statement>?
liveness: Is variable 'i' live at the end of function 'main'?
Is variable 'j' live at the end of function 'main'?
dead_code: Can the statement 'printf(" ");' be considered dead code?
